title: Photodynamic therapy remodels the prostate cancer microenvironment by suppressing cancer-associated fibroblast-mediated calcium signaling.
publicationName: Journal of photochemistry and photobiology. B, Biology
journalName: Journal of photochemistry and photobiology. B, Biology
snippet: Prostate cancer (PCa) remains a leading cause of cancer burden in men worldwide. Photodynamic therapy (PDT) offers a minimally invasive therapeutic option, but the molecular mechanisms underlying its anti-tumor efficacy, particularly in the context of the tumor microenvironment, are not fully elucidated.
